CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "HTS - ONPOINT SERVICES") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "HTS - ONPOINT SERVICES") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "HTS - ONPOINT SERVICES"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "High Throughput Screening Reagents - HTS"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "HTS"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "22-HTS")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-HTS OnPoint
